# ChinaEase Buddy

> ChinaEase Buddy is a web-based China travel toolkit for foreign visitors.
> It provides practical help before a trip and while traveling in China,
> including guidance for apps, payments, transport, food, hotels,
> emergency situations, bilingual traveler-to-local communication, and Buddy AI travel questions.

## Core tools

- Travel preparation and essential app guidance
- Payment guidance for foreign visitors
- Transport, taxi, metro, train, and airport help
- Food, restaurant, and common dish references
- Hotel and stay-related phrase support
- Emergency numbers and bilingual phrase cards
- Buddy AI travel assistance, subject to the current account allowance

## Plans

- Free: basic travel toolkit and 5 Buddy AI messages
- Trip Pass: USD 9.90 one-time, 50 Buddy AI messages, valid for 7 days
- Group Pass: USD 29.90 one-time, 200 Buddy AI messages, valid for 14 days
- Group Pass uses one ChinaEase Buddy account and one shared allowance for couples, families, or small travel groups
- PayPal Sandbox checkout and automatic entitlement activation are in development; live checkout is not enabled until owner approval
- No auto-renewal
- Menu photo help is in private testing and is not sold as an active entitlement.

- [Home](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/)

- [China payment guide](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/china-payment-guide)
- [China travel checklist](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/china-travel-checklist)
- [Emergency numbers](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/china-emergency-numbers)
- [FAQ](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/faq)
- [Pricing](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/pricing)
- [About](https://chinaease-buddy.pages.dev/about)

## Audience

Foreign visitors preparing for or traveling in China, including tourists,
business travelers, students, families, and first-time visitors.

## Important limitations

ChinaEase Buddy is not an official government, visa, immigration, medical,
legal, financial, hotel booking, flight booking, or travel agency service.
Important travel, entry, health, and payment information should be confirmed
with official sources or service providers.

The toolkit provides practical references and AI-assisted travel information
for convenience. It does not guarantee payment acceptance, transport availability,
translation accuracy, emergency outcomes, or official policy status.

Dish reference tools may help identify possible ingredients and common allergens
from local menu information. Travelers should always confirm directly with
restaurant staff, especially for severe allergies.
